Area Converter

✅ Free · 🔒 No signup · 📊 Industry-standard formulas
Conversion formula

Common Conversions

sq ft → sq m sq m → sq ft acres → sq ft sq ft → acres hectares → acres acres → hectares

Frequently Asked Questions

One acre equals 43,560 square feet. That's approximately a square measuring 208.7 feet on each side. A standard American football field (excluding end zones) is about 1.32 acres.

Multiply square feet by 0.092903 to get square meters. For example, 1,000 sq ft × 0.092903 = 92.9 sq m. For a quick estimate, divide square feet by 10.764.

Divide your lot's square footage by 43,560. For example, a 10,890 sq ft lot = 0.25 acres (a quarter acre). A 21,780 sq ft lot = 0.5 acres (a half acre).

A hectare is a metric unit of area equal to 10,000 square meters or approximately 2.471 acres. It's commonly used in countries that use the metric system for land measurement.

One square yard equals 9 square feet. To convert square feet to square yards, divide by 9. For example, 1,000 sq ft ÷ 9 = 111.1 sq yd.
